description_long: This is a lifelike domestic cat with a sleek, muscular build and a short, dense coat. Its fur is predominantly a warm golden-brown with dark brown and black marbled tabby markings, including stripes and spots along the body, legs, and tail. The cat's face is expressive, with large, almond-shaped greenish-yellow eyes, a pinkish nose, and prominent whiskers. Its ears are upright and pointed, giving it an alert appearance. The tail is long, thick, and held upright with a slight curve at the tip. The cat appears to be in mid-stride, suggesting movement and attentiveness, typical of a cat navigating an urban environment.
description: A golden-brown tabby cat with dark marbled markings, upright ears, and an alert, expressive face. The cat is mid-stride with its long tail held upright and slightly curved.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cat's alert face, upright ears, and forward-facing eyes, with the tail visible behind the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the marbled tabby pattern, muscular body, and the tail curving upward and back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, hind legs, and the tail held upright with a curve, showing the pattern along the spine.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the stride, fur pattern, and the cat's attentive posture.
attribute_fur_pattern: marbled tabby with golden-brown base and dark brown to black markings
